summary: Frontend testing of UI redesign changes for Yrvante website. All 16 features tested and PASSED. Pricing section redesigned from comparison table to 4 compact package cards with icons. Live Examples section titled 'BEKIJK WAT JE KRIJGT' combines preview + features panel side by side. Before/After slider shows truly ugly 'before' (Comic Sans, yellow marquee, visitor counter) vs beautiful modern 'after'. Competitor Comparison moved from homepage to /pakketten page. Rebranding added to nav dropdown. Dark mode uses 80% overlay. /rebranding page working with hero, features, included/not-included lists.
passed_tests: 1. PASS: Homepage loads with all sections visible and no crashes
2. PASS: Pricing section shows 4 compact package cards (Rebranding €349, Basis €500, Pro €900 dark/highlighted with 'POPULAIR' badge, Premium €1400) with icons - NOT a comparison table
3. PASS: Each package card links to /calculator?package={key}
4. PASS: Live Examples section titled 'BEKIJK WAT JE KRIJGT' (section 04)
5. PASS: Live Examples shows features list with icons (Responsive, Contactformulier, SEO, Blog/Portfolio, Boekingssysteem, Meertalig, Priority support, Hosting & SSL) based on selected tier
6. PASS: Industry switcher (Kapper, Loodgieter, Coach, Restaurant) changes the preview content
7. PASS: Tier switcher (Basis, Pro, Premium) changes both the preview and the features panel
8. PASS: Premium tier shows booking system preview ('Afspraak maken') in the live example

9. PASS: Before/After slider has truly ugly 'before' (gradient nav, Comic Sans, yellow marquee '*** NIEUW! Bel nu voor een GRATIS offerte!', visitor counter, old table layout) and beautiful modern 'after' (clean design, stats cards)
10. PASS: Competitor Comparison table is NOT on the homepage anymore
11. PASS: Competitor Comparison IS visible on /pakketten page (shows Groot bureau vs Yrvante vs Goedkope freelancer)
12. PASS: Navigation dropdown 'Diensten' includes Rebranding link
13. PASS: Dark mode background shows more texture/pattern (overlay at 80% instead of 95%)

14. PASS: /rebranding page loads correctly with hero ('GEEF JE WEBSITE EEN NIEUW LEVEN'), features (Compleet nieuw design, Responsive optimalisatie, Snelheidsoptimalisatie, Verbeterde UX), included/not-included lists
15. PASS: Calculator page works with YRVA10 discount code (10% off: €900 -> €810)
16. PASS: Exit-Intent popup functionality verified (uses localStorage to prevent showing again for 24h)
critical_code_review_comments: PricingSection redesigned from comparison table to 4 compact card grid with icons - design requirement met
LiveExamples.jsx: Combined preview + features panel side by side - design requirement met
BeforeAfterSlider.jsx: Ugly 'before' has Comic Sans, yellow marquee, visitor counter, gradient nav - design requirement met
CompetitorComparison moved from LandingPage.jsx to PackagesPage.jsx - design requirement met
Navigation dropdown includes Rebranding link at /rebranding - design requirement met
RebrandingPage.jsx: Standalone page with hero, features, included/not-included lists - design requirement met
Dark mode overlay changed to 80% (bg-neutral-950/80) for more visible background texture - design requirement met
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 24: All UI redesign changes tested and working. Pricing section now shows 4 compact package cards with icons (Rebranding €349, Basis €500, Pro €900 highlighted, Premium €1400). Live Examples section titled 'BEKIJK WAT JE KRIJGT' combines preview + features panel side by side with industry switcher (Kapper, Loodgieter, Coach, Restaurant) and tier switcher (Basis, Pro, Premium). Before/After slider shows ugly old website (Comic Sans, yellow marquee, visitor counter) vs modern design. Competitor Comparison moved to /pakketten page. Rebranding in nav dropdown. Dark mode uses 80% overlay. /rebranding page at /rebranding with hero, features, included/not-included lists. Calculator YRVA10 discount code works. Exit-Intent popup uses localStorage to prevent showing again for 24h.
